themeWords.meaning: to boast or shine; to celebrate and laud

sentenceTheme: All nations are called to praise the LORD for his merciful kindness and enduring truth.

verses.text: O praise the LORD, all ye nations: praise him, all ye people.

highlightedWords.meaning: to boast or shine; to celebrate and laud
a nation, people; often of the Gentiles

verses.text: For his merciful kindness is great toward us: and the truth of the LORD endureth for ever. Praise ye the LORD.

highlightedWords.meaning: steadfast love; covenant loyalty; mercy and kindness
